name: Coffee Crunch Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 3/4 cup sugar, strong coffee, and light corn syrup in a saucepan at least 5 inches deep.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil and cook until it reaches 310°F on a candy thermometer or reaches the hard-crack stage (a small amount of mixture dropped into cold water will break with a brittle snap).
3. Remove the syrup from heat. Immediately add the soda and stir vigorously until the mixture thickens and pulls away from the sides of the pan. Do not destroy the foam by excessive beating.
4. Pour the foamy mass into an ungreased 9-inch square metal pan without spreading or stirring. Let stand without moving until cool.
5. When ready to garnish, knock the hardened mixture out of the pan and crush between sheets of waxed paper with a rolling pin to form coarse crumbs.
6. Split the cake into 4 equal layers.
7. Combine the remaining whipping cream, 2 tablespoons sugar, and vanilla in a chilled bowl and beat until stiff.
8. Spread about half of the cream between the layers and the remainder over the top and sides of the cake.
9. Sprinkle generously with the crushed topping.
10. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
